industries.name: Fresh Produce
industries.description: Leafy greens, herbs, melons, and fresh-cut produce

industries.name: Dairy
industries.description: Milk, cheese, yogurt, and cultured dairy products

industries.name: Shell Eggs
industries.description: Fresh and processed shell egg products

checklists.name: FSMA 204 Fresh Produce Traceability
checklists.description: CTE and KDE compliance checklist for leafy greens, herbs, melons, and fresh-cut produce under FSMA Section 204.

requirements.title: Traceability Lot Code (TLC)
requirements.description: Assign a unique TLC to each lot of fresh produce at the point of receiving or initial packing.

requirements.title: Receiving CTE Records
requirements.description: Capture grower lot ID, harvest date, and cooling location at the RECEIVING CTE.

requirements.title: Transformation CTE Records
requirements.description: Link input TLCs to output TLCs when produce is cut, mixed, or repackaged.

requirements.title: Shipping CTE Records
requirements.description: Record TLC, quantity, destination, and ship date for every outbound lot.

requirements.title: 24-Hour Recall Response
requirements.description: Demonstrate ability to produce all required KDE records within 24 hours of an FDA request.

requirements.title: Supplier TLC Linkage
requirements.description: Maintain upstream TLC references from direct suppliers for at least 2 years.

checklists.name: FSMA 204 Seafood Traceability
checklists.description: CTE and KDE compliance checklist for finfish and shellfish chain-of-custody under FSMA Section 204.

requirements.title: Source Vessel / Harvest Reference
requirements.description: Record source vessel name or aquaculture site ID as a KDE for all finfish and shellfish.

requirements.title: Landing Date KDE
requirements.description: Capture the date seafood was landed or harvested as part of the HARVESTING CTE.

requirements.title: Temperature Log
requirements.description: Maintain cold-chain temperature records throughout the supply chain as a supporting KDE.

requirements.title: Receiving CTE Records
requirements.description: Document TLC, quantity, supplier reference, and receiving date at each receiving point.

requirements.title: Lot Transformation Linkage
requirements.description: Link input lots to output lots when fish is processed, portioned, or repackaged.

requirements.title: Shipping CTE Records
requirements.description: Record TLC, destination, ship date, and quantity for every outbound seafood lot.

checklists.name: FSMA 204 Dairy Traceability
checklists.description: CTE and KDE compliance checklist for soft cheeses and fluid dairy products under FSMA Section 204.

requirements.title: Supplier Lot KDE
requirements.description: Capture the supplier's lot number for all incoming dairy ingredients as a receiving KDE.

requirements.title: Co-Mingling Event Records
requirements.description: Document all lots that were combined during processing, preserving individual lot references.

requirements.title: Production Line KDE
requirements.description: Record the production line identifier for each finished product batch.

requirements.title: Hold & Release Status
requirements.description: Track hold and release decisions for every lot and link to the associated TLC.

requirements.title: Packing CTE Records
requirements.description: Record TLC, pack date, package size, and production line at the PACKING CTE.

requirements.title: Shipping CTE Records
requirements.description: Capture TLC, destination, ship date, and quantity at the SHIPPING CTE.

checklists.name: FSMA 204 Deli & Prepared Foods Traceability
checklists.description: CTE and KDE compliance checklist for ready-to-eat and mixed-ingredient products under FSMA Section 204.

requirements.title: Input Lot Map
requirements.description: Maintain a complete map of all input lot TLCs that contributed to each finished RTE product lot.

requirements.title: Recipe Revision KDE
requirements.description: Record the recipe or formulation version used for each production batch.

requirements.title: Pack Timestamp KDE
requirements.description: Capture the date and time of packing for each RTE product lot.

requirements.title: Receiving CTE Records
requirements.description: Document TLC, supplier lot, and receiving date for all incoming ingredients.

requirements.title: Transformation CTE Records
requirements.description: Link all input TLCs to output TLCs for every transformation step.

requirements.title: Shipping CTE Records
requirements.description: Record TLC, destination, ship date, and quantity for outbound RTE lots.

checklists.name: FSMA 204 Shell Egg Traceability
checklists.description: CTE and KDE compliance checklist for shell eggs under FSMA Section 204.

requirements.title: Pack Date KDE
requirements.description: Record the Julian pack date on every carton and in traceability records.

requirements.title: Facility Registration Number
requirements.description: Capture the FDA facility registration number as a KDE at the packing facility.

requirements.title: Distributor Reference KDE
requirements.description: Maintain distributor name and reference number linking packed lots to downstream buyers.

requirements.title: Receiving CTE Records
requirements.description: Document incoming flock source, lay date range, and quantity at receiving.

requirements.title: Packing CTE Records
requirements.description: Record pack date, facility registration, lot size, and carton count at packing.

requirements.title: Shipping CTE Records
requirements.description: Capture TLC, distributor reference, ship date, and quantity at shipping.
